ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team conducting the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being used in the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for training */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  "last_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last training run for quick reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client" TEXT /* Client or organization for which the project is being conducted */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the team is working on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., office, remote) */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., NLP, computer vision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the training run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number within the experiment */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before training */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after training */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of returns */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean KL divergence */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return */,
  "time" REAL /* Total time */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the training was conducted */,
  "resource_usage" REAL /* Amount of computational resources used */,
  "hyperparam_version" TEXT /* Version of the hyperparameters used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run the annotation is associated with */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., bug, improvement, observation) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the annotation is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run the hyperparameters are associated with */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in training */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in training */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Regularization method used in training */,
  "hyperparam_version" TEXT /* Version of the hyperparameters */,
  "early_stopping" INTEGER /* Whether early stopping was used */,
  "batch_normalization" INTEGER /* Whether batch normalization was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)
